ItacPersonItem.Notes: For Rospigliosi`s dates and literary activity, see his biography by Luciano Osbat in DBI. His membership in the Accademia degli Infecondi with the nickname `Intatto` is mentioned by Gimma, Elogi, vol. 2 (1703), p. 26.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
